summary: Matched a cluster of Bob-omb item routines in src/melee/it/items/itbombhei.c, added a BombHei-specific static inline header for matching helpers, expanded BombHei item variable and attribute structs, and tightened itbombhei.h prototypes. The decomp.dev report credited 8 new full matches and 2 near-matches/improvements, adding 3148 matched bytes and raising matched code by +0.08%. Human review evidence is absent in the slice.

key_files.role: Main decompilation work: replaced placeholders with matched or near-matched BombHei spawn, animation, collision, pickup, and state-transition routines.
New private static inline helper header containing JObj transform-preservation helpers, fake JObj setters, dynamic bone access, and motion inline fragments used for matching.
Expanded itBombHei_ItemVars layout with offsets and added itBombHeiAttributes; added dolphin/types.h for Vec3.
Corrected public prototypes, including it_8027D670 returning Item_GObj* and several UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations becoming void Item_GObj* signatures.

what_changed: Implemented it_8027D670 as a BombHei item spawner that fills SpawnItem fields, calls Item_80268B18, then calls it_8027F8E0 when spawn succeeds; bot report lists it_8027D670 as improved to 99.98%, not fully matched.

Implemented fully matched functions reported by decomp.dev: it_8027D730, it_3F14_Logic6_Spawned, it_8027D820, fn_8027DAC8, itBombhei_UnkMotion0_Anim, it_8027DE18, itBombhei_UnkMotion1_Coll, and it_3F14_Logic6_PickedUp.

Added a near-matched itBombhei_UnkMotion8_Anim path using inline_UnkMotion8_Anim and conditional it_8027D820; bot report says it reached 90.36%, and the diff includes a todo noting the inline is incorrect.
Expanded itBombHei_ItemVars from a short set of unknown fields through xDEC into a larger offset-documented layout ending with Vec3 xE0C.
Added itBombHeiAttributes with eight fields x0 through x1C, used by spawned, pickup, and scale/timer logic.
Added itbombhei.static.h with static inline helpers for preserving bone 0xB translateY/rotationX across Item_80268E5C animation state changes.
Changed multiple itbombhei.h prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to typed void Item_GObj* signatures, and changed it_8027D670 from void to Item_GObj*.
smart_moves: Separated match-only local helpers into itbombhei.static.h instead of polluting the public header, making private inline choreography reusable inside the unit while keeping API prototypes cleaner.
Preserved dynamic bone 0xB translation Y and rotation X across Item_80268E5C state changes, which is a targeted solution for item animation transitions that must not clobber BombHei bone pose.

Used fake_HSD_JObjSetTranslateY and fake_HSD_JObjSetRotationX wrappers with HSD_ASSERTs and ftCo_800C6AFC invalidation behavior to reproduce the expected code shape where ordinary setters did not fit.
Documented struct offsets in itBombHei_ItemVars, which made later field use in the BombHei logic searchable and reduced ambiguity around item variable layout.

Left explicit @todo comments for unresolved matching compromises: PAD_STACK in fn_8027DAC8 and an incorrect inline in itBombhei_UnkMotion8_Anim. This prevents future readers from mistaking near-match scaffolding for a settled abstraction.
decomp_lessons: For item files, matching often depends on getting item-var and article special-attribute layouts correct before the function bodies become simple field assignments and timer logic.

When an item animation state transition must preserve a dynamic bone transform, snapshot the specific HSD_JObj fields before Item_80268E5C and restore them afterward; this pattern appears central to BombHei matching.
Private static headers can be useful for unit-local inline fragments that are required to force compiler output without exposing tentative helpers globally.

Typed prototypes matter for matching and maintainability: replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with Item_GObj* signatures clarified call sites and enabled implemented functions to compile without placeholder-style declarations.

A decomp.dev near-match percentage can still identify useful progress; this PR intentionally accepted it_8027D670 at 99.98% and itBombhei_UnkMotion8_Anim at 90.36%, with todos marking the remaining mismatch causes.
naming_conventions: Kept existing address-based item function names such as it_8027D670, it_8027D730, it_8027D820, and it_8027DE18 where semantic names were not yet known.
Used item lifecycle names already present in the project style, such as it_3F14_Logic6_Spawned and it_3F14_Logic6_PickedUp.
Named BombHei-specific structs with the existing item style: itBombHei_ItemVars and itBombHeiAttributes.

Unknown item-var fields retained offset-like names such as xDD4, xDD8, xDDC, xDE0, xDE4, xDE8, xDEC, xDF0, xDF8, xDFC, and xE0C; padding/unknown integer fields used underscore-prefixed names _E00, _E04, and _E08.

Private match helpers used descriptive but provisional names such as itBombhei_UpdateStatePreserveBone, itBombhei_UpdateStatePreserveBone2, inline1_UnkMotion0_Anim, inline2_UnkMotion0_Anim, and inline_UnkMotion8_Anim.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used PAD_STACK(8) in fn_8027DAC8 with a todo saying the correct inline was not yet identified.
Introduced static inline fake_HSD_JObjSetTranslateY and fake_HSD_JObjSetRotationX to reproduce setter-like behavior with exact assertions and matrix invalidation calls.
Split animation logic into small static inline fragments, then called them from itBombhei_UnkMotion0_Anim and itBombhei_UnkMotion8_Anim to influence inlining/codegen.
Preserved HSD_JObj transform values around Item_80268E5C calls instead of relying on the animation update to leave dynamic bone state unchanged.
Used explicit temporaries such as temp_f2, temp_f30, and scale in it_3F14_Logic6_Spawned and it_8027D820, consistent with decomp work where temporary lifetime and arithmetic grouping affect matching.
Used direct bitfield manipulation of ip->xDC8_word.flags.x19 and x17, and collision transition calls it_8026E414/it_8026E15C with callbacks fn_80280974/fn_8027DAC8.

review_feedback.feedback: Reported +3148 matched bytes, +0.08% matched code, 8 new full matches, and 2 improvements in unmatched functions for main/melee/it/items/itbombhei.
No human review comments or PR body feedback were present in the provided slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching itbombhei.static.h to see whether the PAD_STACK(8) todo in fn_8027DAC8 was replaced by a correct inline.
Find later PRs touching itBombhei_UnkMotion8_Anim to see whether the incorrect inline todo was resolved and the function reached 100%.
Search for itBombHeiAttributes field renames after PR 1991 to map x0/x4/x8/x10/x14/x18/x1C to semantic names.
Search for other item static headers that use preserve-bone helpers around Item_80268E5C for reusable matching patterns.
Check whether itBombHei_ItemVars fields _E00, _E04, and _E08 were later identified or renamed.
